otherProjects.title: Explore More Work
otherProjects.subtitle: Each project has its own context, constraints, and decisions. Take a look at other interfaces, systems, and product experiences I helped bring to life.

figmaBox: Click to view some pages of the prototype

bettingSportTemplate.title: Betting Sport System
bettingSportTemplate.subtitle: Designed the UI/UX and developed the front-end for the first version of a sports betting platform.
bettingSportTemplate.sectionTitleEmphasis: Customization & Performance for a Smoother Experience.
bettingSportTemplate.sectionSubtitleEmphasis: Optimized technologies ensuring speed, adaptability, and seamless interactions.
bettingSportTemplate.subtitleFirstBox: Implemented skeleton loading for smoother user interactions and optimized WEBP images to enhance performance and reduce loading times.
bettingSportTemplate.subtitleSecondBox: Utilizing SVG illustrations for high-quality visuals, ensuring seamless scalability and easy customization to match different brand identities.
bettingSportTemplate.titleThirdBox: Real-Time State Management with Redux & Firebase
bettingSportTemplate.subtitleThirdBox: Integrated Redux with Firebase to manage real-time data updates efficiently, ensuring live event information is always synchronized across all components.
bettingSportTemplate.sectionSubtitleBrands: Trusted by real-world sports betting platforms to deliver a personalized and unique experience while maintaining their brand identity.

ecommerceSebrae.subtitle: Digital transformation for efficient and accessible online events.
ecommerceSebrae.introduction: Led UX/UI and Front-end development to transform in-person events to a robust e-commerce platform amid the pandemic. Streamlined existing infrastructure for a user-friendly digital hub, enhancing online transactions and overall digital experience for entrepreneurs
ecommerceSebrae.subtitleFirstBox: Implementing a mobile-first approach, we are incorporating designated breathing spaces to enhance user comfort and streamline platform accessibility.
ecommerceSebrae.subtitleSecondBox: Utilizing color patterns to guide the user and emphasize priority information during navigation.
ecommerceSebrae.subtitleThirdBox: Learning from the user through tracking tools to enhance their experience on the platform.
ecommerceSebrae.titleFourthBox: Optimizing Web Performance for Visual Accessibility
ecommerceSebrae.subtitleFourthBox: Illustrations Enhancing User Communication: Leveraging SVG Format for Web Optimization without Compromising Performance.
ecommerceSebrae.sectionSubtitleColor: Color scheme developed based on the brand colors, along with a set of complementary colors, designed to be implemented into the system to maintain visual identity.
ecommerceSebrae.sectionSubtitleIcon: Incorporate illustrations to enhance user communication, employing SVG format for web optimization without compromising performance. Notably, all icons showcased on this project have been personally designed, adding a distinct touch to the creative work presented.

webkitUi.title: WebKit UI
webkitUi.subtitle: A corporate Design System built to scale interface development across multiple products, connecting design tokens, reusable components, technical documentation, and delivery automation within a decoupled architecture.
webkitUi.heroImageAlt: Dashboard built with WebKit UI components
webkitUi.introTitle: Technical leadership in the creation, documentation, and evolution of a Design System adopted by different teams and products, with a focus on visual consistency, code quality, and delivery speed.
webkitUi.introSubtitle: Accelerating interface development through visual standardization, code reuse, and technical governance.

metrics.title: Documented components
metrics.description: Versioned and documented components for use in React and Next.js applications

metrics.title: Consumer products
metrics.description: Projects configured to consume components on demand, with terminal-based installation and source code versioned within each repository

metrics.title: Automated steps
metrics.description: Unit tests, lint validation, application build, Storybook build, and component registry build validated through the CI/CD pipeline

webkitUi.modularInterfacesDescription: Reusable components that reduce rework, improve visual consistency, and allow products to focus more on business rules and user experience.
webkitUi.interfaceImageAlt: Screen showing WebKit UI in action
webkitUi.terminalImageAlt: Terminal installing a WebKit UI component
webkitUi.componentConsumptionDescription: Each project installs only the components it needs, keeping the code versioned inside the application itself. This approach reduces coupling, avoids unnecessary dependencies, decreases bundle size, and enables controlled product-level customization.
webkitUi.architectureDescription: Architecture based on the separation between tokens, components, registry, and consumer applications, enabling independent evolution, controlled reuse, and visual standardization across products.
webkitUi.cicdDescription: GitHub Actions automation to validate tests, lint, and builds before publication, increasing delivery safety, consistency, and reliability.
webkitUi.documentationDescription: Structured usage guides, implementation standards, maintenance criteria, and best practices to support adoption, review, and evolution of components across different products.
